HGSS.072.0000:
Welcome to this chamber!\f
We are reconstructing ancient Pokémon
stone panels.\f
You can rotate stone-panel pieces by
touching them for a short time.\f
If you touch a piece and slide it,
you can move it around.\f
We think we should be able to put them
back to where they were...
HGSS.072.0001:
You reconstructed the stone panel?\f
That’s great!
We have an archaeology genius here!
